calendar.matters:
Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Account, Damages, Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Rescission Of Agreement
Off Calendar Jul-09-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition for Removal of Trustee; Account; Damages; Appointment of Successor Trustee; Rescission of Agreement is off calendar.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Account, Damages, Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Rescission Of Agreement
Off Calendar Jun-04-2018 Continued To Jul-09-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Timothy Hannan for Tullio Anastasio and Angelo Anastasio (Petitioners).
Steve McDonald for Stanley Anastasio (Trustee).

Mr. McDonald stated that the matter settled in mediation, that a settlement agreement was signed, that one of the terms of the settlement calls for sale of a property to two of the Beneficiaries and that there is some delay in signing of the closing papers. Mr. McDonald also stated that his Clients have advised the parties that they have two weeks to sign the papers or they will file a petition to enforce the settlement. Mr. Hannan stated that signing of the papers is to his Client's benefit, that he does not know why they are not signing and that he will talk with them. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. is continued to July 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Account, Damages, Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Rescission Of Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-26-2018 Continued To Jun-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Timothy Hannan for Tullio Anastasio and Angelo Anastasio.

Mr. Hannan stated that his Clients are on a beneficial end of a settlement agreement and are unwilling to end it, that they reached a settlement on January 22nd at mediation, and that the settlement was signed and delivered. Mr. Hannan also stated that the settlement included a provision for transfer of title of the property to Angelo, that for some reason Angelo doesn't want to do anything and that they will file a motion to enforce the settlement agreement. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. is continued to June 4, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: B. Wan. Not reported.

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Account, Damages, Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Rescission Of Agreement
Off Calendar Mar-12-2018 Continued To Mar-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Account, Damages, Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Rescission Of Agreement
Off Calendar Feb-05-2018 Continued To Mar-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Account, Damages, Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Rescission Of Agreement
Off Calendar Dec-11-2017 Continued To Feb-05-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Removal Of Trustee, Account, Damages, Appointment Of Successor Trustee; Rescission Of Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-25-2017 Continued To Dec-11-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Timothy Hannan for Tullio Anastasio and Angelo Anastasio (Petitioners).
Colin Larson for Stanley Anastasio (Respondent).

Counsel reported that they are making good progress, that they are cooperating and exchanging information informally, that they have discussed the matter at great length, and that have a mediation schedule (provide documents as soon as they can, meet and confer by October 26th, mediate by November 16th and continue the matter to December 12th). Counsel also discussed the issue of whether the accounting was still be requested and agreed to hold off on the Court ordering an accounting at this time. The Petition for Removal of Trustee, etc. is continued to December 11, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court advised Mr. Hannan that if he wants to pursue the petition, he has to provide a brief on the question of rescission and provide an amendment naming a Successor Trustee if he wants to proceed on the issue of removal.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
